Privacy & Security Notice

Before you begin,
please read.

This is a working prototype built by Melli for the CGC Display Assessment. It is not a production tool. Please take a moment to understand how your data is handled.

CGC Display Assessment Prototype
Prepared by Melli
Hosted on GitHub Pages
Data storage
Everything stays in your browser
All session data — photos, ratings, notes, customer names — is stored only in your browser's localStorage. No Melli or client server receives or stores any of it. If you clear your browser data, it is gone permanently.
External calls
Two external services are used
  • Google Fonts — loaded on page open. Your IP is sent to Google's CDN.
  • Anthropic API — called only if you click "Generate AI Summary." Notes and ratings are sent. Photos are never sent.
AI Summary — important
Your API key, your responsibility
If display notes are commercially sensitive, do not use AI Summary without confirming your Anthropic API key terms are acceptable for that material. The full tool works without it.
When you generate an AI summary, your notes go to Anthropic under your own account's terms. Melli does not see the content. Standard retention is up to 30 days.
Security
Know the limitations
  • No login — anyone with the URL can use the tool
  • API key in localStorage — treat it like a password
  • No audit trail — no record of who used the tool or when
  • UK GDPR lawful basis: legitimate interest
For internal Melli use only — share with client before launch.
By continuing you confirm
you have read this notice.
